text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year. Agnes Digital and I are visiting
a shrine to commemorate the occasion and her
entrance into her senior year.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
O gods. This year, I don't need any new merch.
Instead, please send me rivals!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's starting out the year with a very unexpected
request.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nothing. I just want to catch up with Opera O and
Doto this year, no matter what it takes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I went and told them I'd like to have a group bout
in the fall, but...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Naturally, I welcome a challenge!
However, you have a grave weakness, Digital!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Will you manage to realize what this is on your
own? If not, challenging the two of us will never
be anything but a dream.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! What weakness?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The fact that you have no rivals!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huuuuh?! You're just going to tell her?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hearing it like that, I realized she was right. It's
been a real blind spot, huh? Every shonen protag
has a rival, but not me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If I don't have a main competitor who pushes me
to get stronger, there's no way I can catch up to
Opera O and Doto.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, please, Trainer, I need some names! Are there
any Umas out there that'll send sparks flying?
choice_data_list: Wouldn't you be the best judge for that?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's a no-go. I'm an all-rounder, meaning I love
everyone equally. If I try to choose, I'll just get
stuck in a never-ending loop.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: So how about it? Can you think of anyone?
choice_data_list:
Why don't we start with people who are likely
to accept?

Why don't we start with people who are likely
to accept?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, good point. If the other party doesn't give
the go-ahead, we can't exactly call them an
archnemesis slash rival.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Well then, let's find some likely candidates!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Uh, what?! You want me to be your rival?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Your cocky know-it-all attitude
makes you one of the biggest characters in our
year!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I know we haven't really rubbed shoulders much,
but what do you say?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: In your dreams. Not interested.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Rivals, eh? It seems you've mistaken being
the target of my one-sided research for some kind
of reciprocal relationship...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooof. I see...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to get so depressed, Digital. If
you're looking for a catalyst to draw out your
unique qualities...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I have a feeling the answer is already clear.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Really? Who is it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's not for me to say. Well... not only me,
actually.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It's not for anyone to say. Isn't that right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Put on the spot, I'm hard-pressed to think of a
reply. What could she mean by a rival no one can
tell her about?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, ponder on it for a bit. Seek and you will
find.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: If you're truly observing your trainee, that is.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you have any idea what she's talking
about?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give it some thought. So long as I think hard, the
answer should come to me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What are her strengths? And who can draw them
out?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The answer is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Have you figured it out?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Then, who would be the best rival for me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaat?! Everyone?! So, that means I can
continue simping for everyone equally?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's biggest strength is that she can
run on both turf and dirt. If we were to choose an
individual rival...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She would be limited to running the same tour as
them. And I consider that a drawback, so...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I feel like... maybe I get it... I have to keep loving
everyone in order to be myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't walk the same path as Doto or the
Overlord.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's her only option if she's to have a chance at
victory. Meisho Doto and T.M. Opera O are both
still amongst the strongest runners.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Normal training won't cut it. If Agnes Digital
wants to beat them, she must build up
experiences so varied that no one else on the
track will know her next move.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it... King said something
similar...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Race against as many as you can and absorb
everything. And then...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Become a true all-rounder. You are a part of what
you cherish most.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I get it now! The way I am now, I can move
forward alongside all Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
They're all my rivals! Which is precisely how I'm
able to—
choice_data_list: Grow through the power of friendship!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nourishment! That's right! Each Horsegirl has her own
flavor, and I get energized every time I run with
them!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Every day, I get fresh sustenance from my oshis!
There's no better fuel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt that plenty of runners will
continue contributing to Agnes Digital's growth.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The power of friendship! Yeah... I'll gather power
from everyone little by little...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And then use it for an explosive finale! I feel like
that might really be my style!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like interacting with new runners will
allow Agnes Digital to become even stronger in
the future.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Diversity! That's right. Every Umamusume runs
differently, but everyone runs well!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can worship everyone while taking it all in! I
wanna be a walking Umamusume encyclopedia!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital takes in what she sees earnestly—a
disposition which will certainly tie into her future.
